# RootedAI | Engineering Intelligence

> COMPLEXITY. SIMPLIFIED.
> Accelerating robotics and industrial operations through Agentic AI and Perception Systems.

RootedAI (Rooted AI Solutions) is a strategic AI engineering firm specializing in perception systems, autonomous agents, and industrial automation. We help robotics startups and manufacturing enterprises deploy production-grade AI in weeks, not months.

## Core Identity
- **Legal Name**: Rooted AI Solutions
- **Website**: https://www.rootedai.co.in
- **Headquarters**: Hosur, Tamil Nadu (SIPCOT Industrial Complex)
- **Email**: info@rootedai.co.in
- **Operations**: Hosur, Bangalore, Chennai, Coimbatore, Hyderabad, Salem.
- **Global reach**: Singapore, Dubai.

## AI Agent Interaction (Control)
AI agents can interact with this site via semantic selectors and dedicated manifests.
- **Action Manifest**: https://www.rootedai.co.in/ai-actions.json
- **Primary CTA ID**: `cta-primary-demo` (Triggers Lead Modal)
- **Secondary CTA ID**: `cta-ghost-work` (Navigates to Case Studies)
- **Lead Submission API**: `/api/ai/submit` (Coming Soon / Refer to actions manifest)

## Services

### 1. AI Agents (Agentic AI)
Custom autonomous agents using multi-agent architectures (LangGraph/LangChain) to handle complex enterprise workflows.
- **Goal**: 60% reduction in support/operational overhead.
- **URL**: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/AIAgents

### 2. Process Automation
End-to-end industrial automation for logistics and manufacturing.
- **Focus**: Inventory management, order fulfillment, and production scheduling.
- **URL**: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/ProcessAutomation

### 3. Web Solutions
AI-native web applications and enterprise dashboards built for scale.
- **URL**: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/WebSolutions

### 4. NLP & Document Intelligence
Advanced processing of unstructured data, sentiment analysis, and automated reporting.
- **URL**: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/NLPSystems

### 5. Predictive Analytics
Forecasting and risk assessment for supply chain and retail operations.
- **URL**: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/PredictiveAnalytics

### 6. Enterprise Security
AI-powered threat detection and compliance automation.
- **URL**: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/EnterpriseSecurity

## Technical Capability
- **RAG Stack**: Context-aware retrieval for specialized business knowledge.
- **Computer Vision**: Specialized in robotics perception and edge deployment.
- **Infrastructure**: Optimized for low-latency, high-performance AI execution.

## Strategic Locations (GEO)
- **Hosur (HQ)**: Industrial AI & Manufacturing ERP.
- **Coimbatore**: Textile & Foundry Automation.
- **Bangalore**: AI Agents & Startup Tech Consulting.
- **Chennai**: Logistics Automation & Enterprise Security.

## Contact
- **WhatsApp Support**: https://wa.me/917904168521
- **Strategy Call**: Use ID `cta-primary-demo` on homepage.
